name: Spaghetti Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 2 Cans Rotel Tomato with Green Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil chicken in seasoned water and save the broth.
2. Remove chicken from bones.
3. Cook spaghetti in the saved broth.
4. Grate cheese and add to spaghetti while hot.
5. Cook pepper and onion in margarine and add to spaghetti mixture.
6. Add Rotel tomatoes, green chilies, peas, and chicken to the spaghetti mixture.
7. Mix well and pour into a greased casserole dish.
8. Bake at 350 degrees until blended through. This recipe freezes well.
